question: What are the main failure modes of memory in LLM agents?

coverage.aspect: retrieval of stale or irrelevant memories
trade-offs between short-term and long-term memory

claim_lines: - **Capacity / compression loss**: long interaction histories overflow the context window, and lossy summarization or pruning can discard important details or leave irrelevant errors in play ([Active Context Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07190); [Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07670)). ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07190))

- **Retrieval / organization failure**: the agent retrieves the wrong past experience, or fails to recognize the structure needed to organize memory, so similar inputs trigger misleading outputs ([How Memory Management Impacts LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.16067); [Evaluating Memory Structure in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.11243)). ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.16067))

- **Error propagation / misaligned replay**: once a bad experience is stored, later retrieval can compound the mistake or replay a seemingly valid trace that is actually misleading ([How Memory Management Impacts LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.16067)). ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.16067))

- **Staleness / contradiction drift**: memories are not reliably updated, forgotten, or reconciled, so outdated or conflicting state persists; surveys flag contradiction handling and learned forgetting as open problems ([Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07670)). ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07670))

- **Contamination / poisoning**: malicious or noisy memories can be injected and later retrieved to steer behavior ([AGENTPOISON](https://papers.nips.cc/paper_files/paper/2024/file/eb113910e9c3f6242541c1652e30dfd6-Paper-Conference.pdf)). ([papers.nips.cc](https://papers.nips.cc/paper_files/paper/2024/file/eb113910e9c3f6242541c1652e30dfd6-Paper-Conference.pdf))

A compact summary is: memory usually fails at **write** (bad info gets stored), **manage** (bad info is not cleaned up or structured), or **read** (the wrong thing is retrieved). ([Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07670)) ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07670))
